intro:
The rope's potential has no limits!
Join Rope-kun and conquer the many challenges that await!
description:
Rope-Kun Adventure is a top-down puzzle-action game.
Unleash the full potential of the rope and work with Rope-kun to overcome various challenges!

＊Features＊
・Unique gameplay system of ""rope action""!
・Simple, intuitive controls that anyone can pick up!
・Tons of brain-teasing puzzle gimmicks!
・Fun battles with wacky enemy characters!

＊Rope Handling＊
The possibilities of ropes are endless!
Here are just a few:

1. Pull
Connect Rope-kun to objects and drag them around!

2. Bounce
Use the rope to bounce off rolling balls!

3. Bind
Tie up enemies with the rope to defeat them!
